name: reverse-architecture
description: Reverse-engineer an architecture diagram from existing code, IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Bicep), Kubernetes manifests, docker-compose, package manifests, database schemas, or OpenAPI specs. Emits a structured extraction, a written description suitable for architecture-diagrams, and a first-draft Mermaid or C4 diagram with every node tied to a source-of-truth file path.
